Document:
# TYNE-CLASS MEDICAL SHUTTLE
[color=#a4885c]Ship Size:[/color] Small
[color=#a4885c]Recommended Crew:[/color] 1-2
[color=#a4885c]Power Gen Type:[/color] Plasma
"A small, agile lifeboat with an exterior deck and survivor cabin for search and rescue operations."
[italic]Brought to you by BlueBird Starship Design & Construction.[/italic]
# GETTING THE MOST OUT OF THE TYNE
- The Tyne is a small support vessel without cryogenics. Consider pairing it with a larger hospital ship for advanced treatment. - Due to its small size, the Tyne can easily get in where other ships can't. Use this to its advantage! - Seek out super parts from a scientist for truly rapid response.
